The '''[[Bavakar Medical Research Labs|Bavakar]] strength system''' was an implant used around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The device was used to stimulate a person's body to perform well above its normal level. Only those in fairly good physical condition could handle the use of the strength system.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the playable character must have a constitution attribute of 16 or higher to use the implant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
